scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:netlify: pnpm run build --filter @workspace/doce-site && pnpm run build --filter @workspace/api-server && mkdir -p artifacts/api-server/client && cp -r artifacts/doce-site/dist/public/* artifacts/api-server/client/
scripts.deploy: pnpm run push-force --filter @workspace/db && pnpm run build --filter @workspace/doce-site && pnpm run build --filter @workspace/api-server && mkdir -p artifacts/api-server/client && cp -r artifacts/doce-site/dist/public/* artifacts/api-server/client/
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
